<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Config; use Spatie\Backup\Support\Data; class NotificationSlackConfig extends Data { protected function __construct( public string $webhookUrl, public ?string $channel, public ?string $username, public ?string $icon, ) {} /** @param array<mixed> $data */ public static function fromArray(array $data): self { return new self( webhookUrl: $data['webhook_url'], channel: $data['channel'], username: $data['username'], icon: $data['icon'], ); } }
